brand.name: AutoNateAI GameLab
brand.positioning: AI-powered Roblox publishing for trend games, organization games, educational quests, and creator marketplace offers.

products.title: Opportunity Arcade Pilot
products.subtitle: A 10-15 minute Roblox quest for testing the AutoNateAI publishing loop.
products.description: Players collect demand, community, loop, and proof while racing toward a publish-ready capstone.
products.creator: AutoNate Core Team

products.title: Trend Sniper Sprint
products.subtitle: Research, prototype, and publish a Roblox trend test in one focused sprint.
products.description: Built for fast validation: monitor player demand, shape a mechanic, launch a playable proof, and decide whether to scale.
products.creator: NateDev Studio

products.title: Organization Quest Build
products.subtitle: Turn a program, campaign, or curriculum into a Roblox experience.
products.description: Designed for nonprofits, cities, schools, churches, and workforce programs that need engagement, proof, and distribution.
products.creator: AutoNate Partnerships

products.title: Education Simulation Kit
products.subtitle: Reusable Roblox classroom and training mechanics for learning games.
products.description: Includes quest prompts, assessment loops, badge logic, and facilitator-ready game structures.
products.creator: GameLab Learning

products.title: Creator Vendor Pack
products.subtitle: Marketplace listing, product page copy, and asset packaging for Roblox creators.
products.description: A vendor-ready package for creators who want their Roblox assets positioned like commerce products.
products.creator: AutoNate Marketplace Ops

products.title: Live Build Event
products.subtitle: A hosted GameLab event that turns a concept into a playable Roblox demo.
products.description: Designed for community launches, sponsor activations, and creator education sessions.
products.creator: AutoNate Events
